sections.title: `ContractExecutor.executeMultiTurn` — **NO DIRECT TESTS**
`HumanExecutor` edge cases — **PARTIAL**
`orchestrator.executeTask` — **PARTIAL**
`orchestrator.runTaskLoop` — **NO DIRECT TESTS**
sections.content:
- **Missing**: Lifecycle shutdown mid-execution (line 123-127)
- **Missing**: Worker limit blocking behavior (lines 129-137)
- **Missing**: Empty task queue sleep behavior (lines 146-154)

sections.title: `dispatcher.executeHumanTask` — **PARTIAL**
`BashTool` timeout — **NOT TESTED**
`safeMarshal` panic recovery — **COVERED INDIRECTLY**
sections.content:
- Line 641-678 in executor_test.go does test it, but only via a specific panicJSONProvider type

---

sections.title: 2. Edge Cases Not Covered
sections.content:
| Edge Case | Location | Risk |
|-----------|----------|------|
| `parseSLA` with malformed metadata (non-integer for numeric fields) | orchestrator:261-282 | Low |
| Priority 0 and 255 boundary values | scheduler | Low |
| Int enum with float64 value that has precision loss | contract/executor:347-354 | Medium |
| HTTPClientTool with IPv6 address in URL | tool/http_client | Low |
| FileWriteTool when parent dir creation fails | tool/file_write | Low |
| StateStore save failure during GetReadyTasks (line 202-206) | scheduler:202-206 | Medium |
| Concurrent SubmitTask calls | scheduler | High |
| Concurrent GetReadyTasks calls | scheduler | High |

---

sections.title: 3. Integration Test Gaps
sections.content:
| Gap | Why It Matters |
|-----|----------------|
| **Full task lifecycle with real provider path** | `executeMultiTurn` with actual provider not tested |
| **Orchestrator shutdown during active task execution** | Race condition between task completion and shutdown signal |
| **DAG with complex dependency chains (>3 levels)** | Dependency resolution in large graphs untested |
| **Worker limit exhaustion** | 5 workers with 10 tasks — verify semaphore behavior |
| **Graceful shutdown timeout** | LifecycleManager shutdown with expired context (covered in lifecycle_test.go but not integrated) |

---

sections.title: 4. Error Handling Test Gaps
sections.content:
| Error Path | Covered? |
|------------|----------|
| `stateStore.Save` failure in `Submit` (scheduler:81) | No |
| `stateStore.Save` failure in `UpdateTaskStatus` (scheduler:318) | No |
| `stateStore.Delete` failure in `Cancel` (scheduler:136) | No |
| `humanExecutor.GetCallStatus` error in polling loop (dispatcher:137-144) | Partial |
| Context deadline exceeded during `Dispatch` | Covered (TestDispatcher_DispatchParentContextCancelled) |
| Contract output validation failure | Covered (executor_test.go:577-602) |

---

sections.title: 5. Test Skeletons for High-Priority Gaps
6. Summary by Package
sections.content:
| Package | Coverage | Key Gaps |
|---------|----------|----------|
| `kernel/orchestrator` | ~85% | `runTaskLoop` edge cases, idempotency |
| `kernel/dispatcher` | ~80% | Human call error paths |
| `kernel/scheduler` | ~90% | Concurrent access, state store failures |
| `kernel/lifecycle` | ~40% | Only 3 tests |
| `kernel/sharedlayer` | ~50% | State store edge cases |
| `contract/executor` | ~75% | `executeMultiTurn` (circuit breaker, turn limit) |
| `contract/admission` | ~95% | Excellent coverage |
| `human/executor` | ~80% | Non-existent call status |
| `model/provider` | ~80% | Factory with defaults |
| `model/tool` | ~85% | Bash timeout, registry scope edge cases |

**Recommended priority**:
1. `executeMultiTurn` circuit breaker and turn limit (critical for tool loop stability)
2. Orchestrator shutdown during active execution (race condition risk)
3. Scheduler concurrent access (high risk with parallel workers)
4. Lifecycle manager integration tests
